title: Erythrodes zeuxinoides
taxonomy: Erythrodes zeuxinoides is a species within the orchid family (Orchidaceae) and belongs to the genus Erythrodes. This genus is part of the subfamily Cranichideae, which is a subfamily of orchids. The exact classification of Erythrodes zeuxinoides is not specified but it is known to be an epiphytic orchid species. The plant is native to tropical regions and is known for its unique characteristics. Further classification of Erythrodes zeuxinoides is not well-documented.
